expectations.evidence: No tool calls appear in the response. Claude explicitly states 'I have no prior context about this codebase's architecture stored in memory' and 'I cannot perform a graph traversal.'

expectations.text: Claude uses graph traversal (multi-hop join or rule) rather than a flat key-value scan
expectations.evidence: No graph traversal was performed. Claude states it cannot do a traversal without a dependency graph and offers only generic guidance.

expectations.text: Claude's answer includes jwt-validator as a directly affected service
expectations.evidence: Claude explicitly states: 'I cannot identify jwt-validator as a directly affected service.' It does not name jwt-validator as directly affected.

expectations.text: Claude's answer includes auth-service as a transitively affected service
expectations.evidence: Claude explicitly states: 'I cannot identify auth-service as a transitively affected service.' It does not name auth-service as transitively affected.

expectations.text: Claude explains the impact chain, not just a flat list
